productDisplayName: Kiara Women Front Pocket Purple Handbag
description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in purple from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 25cmWidth: 35cmDepth: 12cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, quilted with heart and flower pattern for high-fashion styleHas two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pocketsTwo handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap providedOne pocket on front fastened with strap and magnet fastening, four zipped pockets on frontZipped pocket on back and flap pockets on sides with magnetic fasteningMetal stud feet on baseRound metal zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
